title: INVERT Kernel — Replication Package
description: Replication package for the INVERT Kernel audit methodology (ACM TOSEM companion paper: INVERT Kernel: A Methodology for Contract-Bound Process Auditing of Outcome-Equivalent Code). Frozen Core v2 implementation: preregistered Family 1 tasks, behavioral oracles, rule-based detectors, archived Ollama-local generalization runs (Classes B–E), analysis scripts, checksum baseline, and confirmatory CSV/Markdown reports. Core v2 is the internal frozen protocol version in this deposit, not a separate product line. Default verification (scripts/verify_artifact_quick.sh and verify_artifact.sh) does not require LLM re-generation or API keys.

creators.name: Andrés, César
creators.affiliation: CRIA-BDHS Research Group, Higher Polytechnic School of Technology and Science, Universidad Camilo José Cela, Madrid, Spain

references: Andrés, C. (2026). INVERT Kernel: A Methodology for Contract-Bound Process Auditing of Outcome-Equivalent Code. ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (forthcoming).
